messages.subject: [R-sig-ins] Webinar signup: Gradient Boosting and Classification Trees: A Winning Combination. November 9, 10-11 a.m., PST
messages.subject_clean: Webinar signup: Gradient Boosting and Classification Trees: A Winning Combination. November 9, 10-11 a.m., PST
messages.body_plain:
Webinar signup: 
Gradient Boosting, Tree Ensembles and Classification Trees: A Winning Combination
November 9, 10-11 a.m., PST.

Webinar Registration: 
http://2.salford-systems.com/gradientboosting/ 

Understand major shortcomings of using only decision trees and how tree ensembles can help overcome these challenges and improve your model building. Combine all of the advantages of using classification and regression trees with the power-house accuracy and interpretability of stochastic gradient boosting.
